# Pull Request Description

<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does -->

## Type of Change

Please check the type of change your PR introduces:

- [ ] **Bug fix** - Non-breaking change that fixes an issue
- [ ] **Feature** - Non-breaking change that adds new functionality
- [ ] **Breaking change** - Fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change
- [ ] **Documentation** - Documentation only changes
- [ ] **Refactoring** - Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] **Performance** - Code change that improves performance
- [ ] **Tests** - Adding or updating tests
- [ ] **CI/CD** - Changes to build, deployment, or workflow configuration

## Summary

<!-- Detailed summary of the changes -->

### Changes Made

- [ ] **File 1:** [Description of changes]
- [ ] **File 2:** [Description of changes]
- [ ] **File 3:** [Description of changes]

### Motivation and Context

<!-- Why is this change necessary? What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- If it fixes an open issue, please link to it here: Fixes #123 -->

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe in detail how you tested your changes:

- [ ] **Test 1:** [Description of test and results]
- [ ] **Test 2:** [Description of test and results]
- [ ] **Test 3:** [Description of test and results]

### Test Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS Sonoma]
- **Version:** [e.g., OpenClaw Father 1.2.3]
- **Configuration:** [Any special configuration used]

## Screenshots (if applicable)

<!-- Add screenshots to help explain your changes -->

## Checklist

Before submitting your PR, please verify:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### Schema Validation

- [ ] I have validated all JSON files against their schemas (if applicable)
- [ ] I have run markdownlint on all markdown files
- [ ] I have checked bash script syntax with `bash -n`

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have updated the changelog (if required)
- [ ] I have added or updated examples (if applicable)

## Breaking Changes

<!-- If this PR introduces breaking changes, please describe them here -->

- [ ] **No breaking changes**
- [ ] **Breaking changes:** [Describe what breaks and migration path]
